adjudication_raw: Votes: a1=critique_wins, a2=critique_wins, a3=critique_wins. Unanimous: critique_wins
assessor_1_raw: Assessor 1: ICD-10 discharge codes as prediction-time labels is a temporal mismatch. Note timestamp leakage. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Assessor 2: Note timestamp vs. event time, ICD-10 label mismatch, note volume in structured features weaken comparison. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Assessor 3: Three genuine flaws in label and feature construction. Verdict: critique_wins.
